colors.rules: Avoid pure black (#000000). Use matte zinc-950 to reduce eye strain. Text should not be pure white, use zinc-50 for peak readability.

spacing_and_layout.global_spacing: Generous. Use p-6, p-8 for containers. Material Design 3 inspired but denser for editorial feel.
spacing_and_layout.desktop_architecture: 3-Column layout: Left Sidebar (Fixed nav, w-64), Center Feed (max-w-md mx-auto, w-full, representing the mobile viewport experience), Right Panel (w-80, sticky for Tattoo DNA insights & stats).
spacing_and_layout.mobile_architecture: Full screen vertical feed (100dvh). Bottom sticky navigation using crystal glassmorphism.
spacing_and_layout.grid_system: Use Bento grids for Artist Profile (Portfolio) and Tattoo DNA data visualization.

motion_and_interactions.vertical_feed: Scroll snap mandatory (snap-y). Each card takes 100dvh (or h-full of feed container).
motion_and_interactions.horizontal_gallery: Nested inside feed card. snap-x mandatory for swipeable artist portfolio pieces.

gestures.double_tap: Trigger Heart animation (scale 0->1->1.2->0, opacity 0->1->0) and save to 'Panom'.
gestures.single_tap: Open fullscreen image viewer modal with backdrop-blur. Clicking outside closes it.
gestures.swipe: Horizontal for gallery, Vertical for next artist in feed.

components.buttons: Pill-shaped (rounded-full). Primary CTA uses gradient_primary with subtle glow shadow. Include data-testid.
components.cards: Subtle zinc-900 background, no border or 1px border-white/5. Overlays for text on images must use max bg-black/50.
components.tattoo_dna: Bento grid layout. Progress bars for style percentages using rose-to-indigo gradient.
components.bottom_nav_mobile: Crystal glassmorphism floating just above bottom. Active icons get rose/indigo gradient text or icon fill.

splash_backgrounds.description: A tattoo artist preparing to start his work. Excellent for splash screen or auth background.

artist_portraits.description: Tattoo artist working on client's arm
A tattoo artist inks a client's arm

tattoo_designs.description: Black and white photo of a person getting a tattoo
Woman with a tattoo on her neck
Arm with a small 444 tattoo in black and white.
Man with trident tattoo on arm

instructions_to_main_agent: Install framer-motion, lucide-react, react-router-dom, and required Shadcn UI components.
Implement language purely in Turkish based on language_mapping.
Do NOT use Inter font. Use 'Cabinet Grotesk' for headings and 'Manrope' for body. Import them via standard CDN/Google Fonts if not locally available.
All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='like-button', data-testid='login-submit').
Feed must use TikTok-style scroll snap behavior (snap-y snap-mandatory).
Double tap must invoke a heart animation overlay using framer-motion scaling and opacity.
Maintain an editorial, luxurious dark theme: zinc-950 base, heavy contrast, glassmorphism overlays, and tasteful rose-to-indigo gradients. Avoid muddy gradients.
Use provided image URLs. NEVER use placeholders.
